description.p: A native Minecraft launcher built for the GNOME desktop. Supports multiple game instances, Fabric, Forge, Quilt and NeoForge mod loaders, Modrinth mod search and download, automatic Java management, and Microsoft account login.

ul.li: Multiple game instances with independent mod folders
Fabric, Forge, Quilt and NeoForge loader installation
Modrinth mod search and one-click install with dependency resolution
Resource packs, shader packs and world management
In-app game console and log viewer

description.p: Улучшена чёткость иконки: все размеры из fav/ теперь устанавливаются в hicolor-тему (16–256 px), GTK выбирает точный размер без апскейла.
Flatpak release with bug fixes and improved stability.
